title: Machine Learning Research Engineer
required_qualifications: Masters in Computer Science, Machine Learning or related field
Demonstrated expertise in computer vision, natural language processing, and machine learning with a passion for data-centric machine learning.
Deep understanding and expertise in foundation models.
Familiarity with emerging trends in generative AI and multi-modal LLM.
Strong programming skills and hands-on experience using the following languages or deep learning frameworks: Python, PyTorch, or Jax.
preferred_qualifications: Familiarity with end-to-end Machine Learning Lifecycle
Demonstrated evidence of prior experience and expertise in data-centric machine learning research
Experience with recent post-training methodologies including reinforcement learning
Ph.D in Machine Learning, Natural Language Processing, Computer Vision, Data Science, Statistics or related areas
responsibilities: Design and development of a comprehensive data selection, curation and annotation framework for foundation models at Apple.
Build evaluation benchmarks and evaluation methodologies to measure capabilities of existing models.
Work on data curation pipelines to hillclimb on benchmarks.
Develop training frameworks for fine-tuning Foundation Models.
education: Masters in Computer Science, Machine Learning or related field (Ph.D. preferred)
